_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Contribute to and oversee cyberspace operational plans (OPLANs) to include annexes.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, IT infrastructure, business units, and vendor organizations to maintain effective data service delivery.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-A-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-001 (OP, cosine: 0.412), DG-T-008 (DG, cosine: 0.408).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.9/10 (raw 0.387). Shared vocabulary: [operational]. DCWF-only terms [annexes, contribute, cyberspace, include, oplans, oversee] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, build, business, cross, data, delivery] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.851 (P=0.852, R=0.850). Balanced P/R — the 11-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Contribute to and oversee cyberspace operational plans (OPLANs) to include annex" and "Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, I" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.440 > STS 0.387 (gap +0.053). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [operational] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.7%. Shared tokens: [operational]. DCWF-only: [annexes, contribute, cyberspace, include, oplans, oversee]. WIDAI-only: [ability, build, business, cross, data, delivery].
